allow: PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { query } = require\('./src/db'\); \(async \(\) => { const t = await query\('SELECT id, nome FROM tags ORDER BY nome'\); console.log\('TAGS:'\); console.table\(t.rows\); const c = await query\('SELECT id, banco FROM contas ORDER BY id'\); console.log\('CONTAS:'\); console.table\(c.rows\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { query } = require\('./src/db'\); \(async \(\) => { const t = await query\(`SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='tags'`\); console.log\('tags cols:', t.rows\); const g = await query\(`SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='gastos'`\); console.log\('gastos cols:', g.rows\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
